About

I have been doing
this long enough to
know what actually matters.

My name is Ghea Mae Dalogdog. For 7+ years I have supported founders, executives, and business owners remotely across the US, Canada, Australia, and the UK — across Amazon agencies, healthcare practices, startups, podcasts, and service businesses.

The best support feels invisible. When it works, the executive never has to think about it — things simply happen, on time, without being asked twice.

I am reliable in a way that is genuinely difficult to find. I follow through without reminders. I communicate clearly and early. I flag problems before they land in your lap. Every employer I have worked with has stayed long-term — not because I was adequate, but because I was genuinely useful.

Executive Inbox Management Strategic Calendar Ownership CRM Administration Client Retention Tracking SOP Creation Workflow Optimization Personal & Family Logistics Stakeholder Communication Cross-functional Coordination Business Development Support
Who I Work Best With

The right fit
matters.

I work best with people who are building something real and need support that keeps up with them.

Founders & CEOs

Moving fast, wearing too many hats, losing time to things that should not need your attention.

Agency owners

Managing clients, a team, and operations simultaneously — and something is always slipping through.

Consultants & coaches

Your work is high-value and your time is limited. Administrative drag is costing you money.

Healthcare providers

Patient scheduling and operational support that works without constant supervision.

Executives in growth mode

Someone who can step in, learn quickly, and hold things together while you focus forward.

What You Gain

Time back in your day

The hours you spend on email, scheduling, and coordination go back to you.

A clear head

You stop holding the details in your mind. I hold them instead.

Nothing dropped

Follow-ups happen. Deadlines are met. Commitments are honored — without you chasing.

Someone you can trust

You give me access to your inbox, your calendar, your clients — and it stays handled.

Fewer surprises

I flag issues before they become problems and give you options, not just updates.

How I Work

Consistent, clear,
dependable.

01

I learn your world

I take time to understand how you think, what matters to you, and how your business runs — before I touch anything.

02

I work ahead, not behind

I do not wait for things to become urgent. I anticipate, prepare, and flag issues before they land in your lap.

03

I communicate clearly

You always know where things stand. Updates are concise and relevant. No guessing, no chasing.

04

I get better over time

The longer we work together, the less I need to ask and the more I can handle without interrupting you.

Operating Principles

How I show up,
every time.

01

Ownership, not task completion

I own the outcome, not just the action item. I do not hand things back the moment they get complicated.

02

Proactive over reactive

I would rather tell you about a problem before it becomes one than report it after the fact.

03

Discretion as a baseline

Sensitive communications, personal matters, and confidential information are handled with care — always.

04

Clear communication, always

If something changes, I tell you. If I need clarity, I ask. If I make a mistake, I say so and fix it.

05

Long-term thinking

I am not here for a short contract. I am here to become genuinely useful — the kind of support you keep.

06

Reliability over impression

I would rather do the work well than look impressive doing it. Consistency matters more than any single moment.

Services

Ways I can
support you.

Every engagement is tailored to what you actually need — not a fixed package, not a menu of tasks.

01

Executive & Calendar Support

Inbox management, calendar ownership, meeting coordination, agenda preparation, and follow-through on every commitment — so nothing slips and you are always prepared.

02

Personal Assistant Support

Travel booking, relocation logistics, personal appointments, family scheduling, gift sourcing, vendor coordination — the personal side of executive life, handled with care and discretion.

03

Operations & CRM Support

CRM maintenance, retention tracking, workflow documentation, process improvement, research, reporting — the operational backbone your business needs to run cleanly.

04

Client & Business Communication

Client onboarding, follow-up management, stakeholder communication, business development coordination — keeping relationships warm and your pipeline moving.

05

Medical Practice Support

Patient scheduling, appointment coordination, provider calendar optimization, patient communication — reliable support built for the pace of a clinical environment.

06

Podcast & Content Operations

Guest scheduling, episode research, show notes, audio editing, publishing workflows — the behind-the-scenes work that keeps consistent content going out on time.

07

Customer & Client Support

Multi-channel support across email, phone, and chat. Issue resolution, escalation handling, order tracking, case documentation, and follow-up — delivered with the consistency and professionalism your clients expect.

Case Studies

A look at
the work.

Four roles where I went beyond task completion and became part of how the business actually ran.

Executive Operations · E-Commerce Agency

Owning the Executive Layer

My Amazon Guy — Jun 2024 to Mar 2025

The executive team had no structured system for 100+ weekly emails, meeting follow-through, or client retention tracking. I built the workflows, created the trackers, and ran the daily cadence so leadership could stay focused on growth.

Personal + Executive Support · Executive Coaching

Running the Business and the Life

Jennifer Bruno, Executive Coach & Organizational Systems Advisor — Apr 2023 to Jun 2024

Medical Operations · Healthcare

Bringing Order to a Busy Practice

Movement Plus Physical Therapy — Mar 2025 to Jan 2026

The clinic was managing 60+ weekly scheduling requests with no consistent follow-up and too many calendar gaps. I took over patient communication, built confirmation workflows, and optimized provider booking.

Executive Operations · Audio & Memory Tech

Becoming the Founder's Right Hand

Lilokwi (Audio Memory Platform) — Sep 2021 to Feb 2023

Supported the founder of a private voice-recording platform — helping families and friends preserve memories through audio — across executive scheduling, research, vendor coordination, travel, and personal logistics. All handled proactively and with full discretion throughout 17 months together.

Ways We Can Work Together

Flexible to
how you work.

I adapt to your structure — not the other way around.

Full-Time Partnership

Fully embedded support, five days a week. I become a consistent, trusted part of how your business runs. Best for executives who need someone deep in the day-to-day.

40 hrs / week

Part-Time Support

Consistent, reliable support at a lighter capacity. Good for founders who need regular help but not full-time hours — without sacrificing quality or continuity.

20 hrs / week

Project-Based

Focused support for a specific initiative — a launch, a relocation, a systems overhaul, an inbox cleanup. Defined scope, clear outcome, clean delivery.

Scope-based engagement
